title: Eight-Graders' Experiences of Participation in the Art Testers Campaign 2018-2019
description: This dataset consists of transcribed group interviews with eight-graders who participated in the Art Testers campaign. Interviews were conducted in ten schools in different parts of Finland before and after the students had visited art performances or exhibitions. In total, a little over 100 students participated in the group interviews. The Art Testers Campaign is a cultural initiative directed at young people in Finland.
